title: Joe Hua Tang Mo
original_title: โจ หัวแตงโม
overview: Joe Hua Tang Mo is a live-action and comedy movie. Joe, a teenager, creates his avatar display ‘Hua Tang Mo’ in a social network, in order to service people who need to look for the real identity of any account usernames or display names on the social network.
